description: Net ETH flow through Curve stETH/ETH pool during the May-June 2022 stETH depeg. Positive = ETH flowing into pool, Negative = ETH being drained (high-quality asset extracted).

q1_transaction_volume.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', block_time) AS month, COUNT(*) AS txns FROM ethereum.transactions WHERE "to" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 AND block_time >= CAST('2022-03-01' AS timestamp) AND block_time < CAST('2022-09-01' AS timestamp) AND success = true GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

q2_eth_inflow_weekly.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week, SUM(CASE WHEN "to" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 THEN CAST(value AS double)/1e18 ELSE 0 END) AS eth_in, COUNT(*) AS n_txns FROM ethereum.traces WHERE "to" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 AND block_time >= CAST('2022-04-01' AS timestamp) AND block_time < CAST('2022-08-01' AS timestamp) AND CAST(value AS double) > 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
q2_eth_inflow_weekly.note: Inflow only. Shows 10x spike during Terra crash (May 9: 548,696 ETH vs normal ~50-138k)

q3_net_eth_flow.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week, SUM(CASE WHEN "to" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 THEN CAST(value AS double)/1e18 ELSE 0 END) AS eth_in, SUM(CASE WHEN "from" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 THEN CAST(value AS double)/1e18 ELSE 0 END) AS eth_out, SUM(CASE WHEN "to" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 THEN CAST(value AS double)/1e18 WHEN "from" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 THEN -CAST(value AS double)/1e18 ELSE 0 END) AS net_eth FROM ethereum.traces WHERE ("to" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 OR "from" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022) AND block_time >= CAST('2022-04-01' AS timestamp) AND block_time < CAST('2022-08-01' AS timestamp) AND CAST(value AS double) > 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

q4_net_steth_flow.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', evt_block_time) AS week, SUM(CASE WHEN "to" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 THEN CAST(value AS double)/1e18 ELSE 0 END) AS steth_in, SUM(CASE WHEN "from" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 THEN CAST(value AS double)/1e18 ELSE 0 END) AS steth_out, SUM(CASE WHEN "to" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 THEN CAST(value AS double)/1e18 WHEN "from" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 THEN -CAST(value AS double)/1e18 ELSE 0 END) AS net_steth FROM erc20_ethereum.evt_Transfer WHERE contract_address = 0xae7ab96520de3a18e5e111b5eaab095312d7fe84 AND ("to" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022 OR "from" = 0xdc24316b9ae028f1497c275eb9192a3ea0f67022) AND evt_block_time >= CAST('2022-04-01' AS timestamp) AND evt_block_time < CAST('2022-08-01' AS timestamp) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

pre_depeg_baseline.interpretation: Net ETH flow oscillates around zero (±10k ETH/week). Pool balanced.

depeg_phase.interpretation: 692,514 ETH net drained from pool during depeg. Peak drain of 390,593 ETH in a single week (May 9, Terra crash). ETH (high-quality asset) selectively extracted while stETH (low-quality) remained.

recovery_phase.interpretation: ETH flows back into pool as stETH discount narrows. Partial recovery.

transparency_trap_evidence.mechanism: Curve stableswap treats stETH ≈ ETH (uniform pricing). When quality diverges (stETH depeg), high-quality asset (ETH) is selectively drained. Pool composition shifts from balanced to stETH-heavy.
transparency_trap_evidence.natural_experiment: Terra/LUNA collapse (May 7-12, 2022) is an exogenous shock to stETH quality — not endogenous to the Curve pool.
transparency_trap_evidence.effect_magnitude: 692k ETH drained in 6 weeks. At ~$2,000/ETH (May 2022), this represents ~$1.4B of high-quality asset extraction.

structural_analogy_to_bct.bct: Low-quality carbon credits (renewables) deposited; high-quality (REDD+, IFM) selectively redeemed
structural_analogy_to_bct.shared_mechanism: Uniform pricing of heterogeneous assets → quality shock → selective extraction of high-quality component
